page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: RawTools is an open-source and freely available package designed to perform scan data parsing and quantification, and quality control analysis of Thermo Orbitrap raw mass spectrometer files.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A standalone tool for extracting data directly from raw files generated by Thermo Orbitrap family instruments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A standalone tool for extracting data directly from raw files generated by Thermo Orbitrap family instruments.
